title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, addressing a critical weakness in vertical integration compared to other AI labs. The video argues that the competitive AI race is shifting from benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure, with implications for service reliability and user experience across Claude's product tiers.
